tree.name: Quentin Grimes
tree.note: Acquired from Dallas Mavericks for Caleb Martin and a 2025 2nd round pick. Re-signed September 30, 2025.

assetsGivenUp.name: Caleb Martin
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Miami Heat.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#35)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Originally PHI's own pick. Traveled through OKC (Mar 2021) → CHA (Feb 2024) → DAL (Jul 2024 6-team trade) → back to PHI (Feb 2025 Grimes trade).

tree.tradeDescription: Philadelphia traded Caleb Martin to Dallas for Quentin Grimes and a 2025 2nd round pick (became Johni Broome #35). Dallas also received a trade exception. Philadelphia also received a trade exception.
